name: Jim Keltner
abstract: James Lee Keltner (born April 27, 1942) is an American drummer and percussionist known primarily for his session work. He was characterized by Bob Dylan biographer Howard Sounes as "the leading session drummer in America".

concerts.label: Delaney & Bonnie and Friends with Billy Preston, Kenny Loggins, and Jim Messina

about_quotes.speaker: Chazz Frichtel
about_quotes.evidence: Jim Keltner is the drummer... we just start running this and we did... maybe 35 cues and the main title... Keltner did his beautiful thing on it
about_quotes.doc_title: Chazz Frichtel interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, June 13, 2016

about_quotes.speaker: Laurence Juber
about_quotes.evidence: these great drummers that I’ve worked with — Jim Keltner and John Robinson and Vinnie Colaiuta.
about_quotes.doc_title: Laurence Juber interviewed by Monk Rowe, Glasgow, Scotland, July 27, 2016 [interview 1 of 2]
